title: Barter measurement and fairness standard
summary: Prevents barter from becoming exploitation by defining units, rules, witnesses, and protected needs.
content: Barter measurement and fairness standard is a practical offline routine for local economy. Define local units for water, grain, meals, fuel, batteries, repair time, transport, and caregiving. Separate emergency aid from barter so desperate people are not forced into unfair survival trades. Post common exchange ranges and review them publicly as scarcity changes. Use a witness for high-value trades and write both sides of the agreement. Protect children, elderly people, sick people, and displaced people from coercive trades. The goal is to make the action repeatable by a tired person, visible to helpers, and safe enough to stop when official help or a safer option appears.
materials: Public board. Context: “Barter measurement and fairness standard”.
steps: Define local units for water, grain, meals, fuel, batteries, repair time, transport, and caregiving.
Separate emergency aid from barter so desperate people are not forced into unfair survival trades.
Post common exchange ranges and review them publicly as scarcity changes.
Use a witness for high-value trades and write both sides of the agreement.
Protect children, elderly people, sick people, and displaced people from coercive trades.
warnings: Use Barter measurement and fairness standard as practical support, not as a replacement for official guidance, trained help, or evacuation when needed.
Urgency does not justify coercion, discrimination, theft, humiliation, or secret decisions in “Barter measurement and fairness standard”.
common_mistakes: Starting from memory instead of written notes while carrying out “Barter measurement and fairness standard”
Letting one tired person control the whole process while carrying out “Barter measurement and fairness standard”
Ignoring the review time while carrying out “Barter measurement and fairness standard”
alternatives: Use a wall board when many people are involved as a fallback for “Barter measurement and fairness standard”
Use pocket cards when movement is required as a fallback for “Barter measurement and fairness standard”
failure_signs: People disagree about the facts, the plan is not being followed, or the situation worsens after the first review during “Barter measurement and fairness standard”
when_not_to_use: Do not use Barter measurement and fairness standard to delay emergency care, evacuation, fire response, or official instructions.
short_term: Write the first safe action, responsible person, materials, and next review time. This note applies specifically to Barter measurement and fairness standard.
long_term: Convert the routine into a repeatable checklist with handover notes and backups. This note applies specifically to Barter measurement and fairness standard.
if_method_fails: Reduce complexity, stop unsafe work, and switch to the safest available fallback. This note applies specifically to Barter measurement and fairness standard.
environment_notes: Adapt the routine to heat, cold, crowding, darkness, limited water, and local hazards. This note applies specifically to Barter measurement and fairness standard.
